title: GWI POS Stage 11 Result
description: Records the outcome of a Stage 11 (system hardening) baseline run. Written by the Stage 11 wrapper after Ansible completes. Lives at /opt/gwi-pos/state/stage11-result.json. Source of truth for whether the last baseline run succeeded, with classified outcomes and per-role failure details. Example: {"schema_version":"1.0","producer":"11-system-hardening.sh","generated_at":"2026-03-20T14:35:00Z","node_id":"nuc-venue-001","baseline_version":"baseline-2026.03.20.1","outcome":"success_with_warnings","ansible_exit_code":0,"duration_seconds":142,"station_role":"server","triggered_by":"installer","changed_count":3,"failed_tasks":[],"required_roles_passed":true,"optional_warnings":["branding: plymouth theme not installed"]}

producer.description: Name of the script that wrote this file.

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this result was written.

node_id.description: Unique node identifier from SERVER_NODE_ID in .env.

outcome.description: Classified outcome. 'success' = all roles passed. 'success_with_warnings' = required passed but optional had issues. 'failed_required' = at least one required/required_if_applicable role failed (node health degrades). 'skipped_unavailable' = baseline was not available (pre-baseline node).

ansible_exit_code.description: Raw exit code from the ansible-playbook process. 0=success, 2=failures, 4=unreachable, etc.

duration_seconds.description: Wall-clock duration of the Ansible run in seconds.

station_role.description: Station role that was used for this run (server, backup, terminal).

changed_count.description: Total number of Ansible tasks that reported 'changed'. For idempotency gate: second run should have changed_count=0 for non-observational roles.

failed_tasks.description: List of task names that failed. Empty array if all passed. Each entry is the Ansible task name (e.g., 'firewall : Enable ufw').

required_roles_passed.description: True if all required and required_if_applicable roles passed. False triggers node health degradation in MC.

optional_warnings.description: List of warnings from optional roles. Informational only — does not affect overall outcome classification beyond 'success_with_warnings'.
